name: Muhammad Ali Jinnah
role: Founder and first Governor-General of Pakistan (1947)
quote: Pakistan not only means freedom and independence but the Muslim Ideology which has to be preserved, which has come to us as a precious gift and treasure and which, we hope others will share with us.

name: Jawaharlal Nehru
role: First Prime Minister of India (1947–1964)
quote: The man who has got blood on his hands thinks that by some hocus pocus he can wash them clean. I want you to know that the world does not forget.

name: Indira Gandhi
role: Indian PM 1966–77, 1980–84. Led India in 1971 war; signed Simla Agreement
quote: You cannot shake hands with a clenched fist.

name: Zulfikar Ali Bhutto
role: Pakistan PM 1973–77; signed Simla Agreement; launched nuclear program
quote: We will eat grass, even go hungry, but we will get one of our own [an atomic bomb].

name: Pervez Musharraf
role: Pakistani President 2001–08; Army Chief 1998–2007; architect of Kargil War
quote: I stand for a moderate, enlightened, and progressive Pakistan. I stand against extremism.

name: Nawaz Sharif
role: Pakistani PM (multiple terms): signed Lahore Declaration (1999); ousted in Musharraf coup
quote: Today, we took a bold, determined step to make peace with India. I am committed to seeing this through.

name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee
role: Indian PM 1998–2004; Pokhran-II, Lahore Declaration, Kargil War, Agra Summit
quote: You can change friends but not neighbors. We must live together with our neighbors.

name: Narendra Modi
role: Indian PM since 2014; ordered surgical strikes (2016), Balakot (2019), revoked Art. 370 (2019), Op. Sindoor (2025)
quote: India will not be deterred. Our response to terrorism will be firm, precise, and decisive.

name: Imran Khan
role: Pakistani PM 2018–2022; released Abhinandan; arrested 2023; political career under army pressure
quote: We want to give peace a chance. The release of Wing Commander Abhinandan is a peace gesture.

name: Hafiz Saeed
role: LeT founder; 26/11 planner; convicted in Pakistan (2020) for terrorism financing
quote: We believe in jihad and we ask every Muslim to take up jihad.

name: Masood Azhar
role: JeM founder; mastermind of Parliament attack (2001), Pathankot (2016), Pulwama (2019); UN-designated terrorist
quote: We will not rest until the freedom of Kashmir is achieved.

name: Syed Salahuddin
role: Chief of Hizbul Mujahideen; most prominent Kashmiri militant commander; US-designated terrorist (2017)
quote: We will continue our struggle until Kashmir is liberated from Indian occupation.

name: Manmohan Singh
role: Indian PM 2004–2014; 26/11 crisis management; Musharraf-Manmohan 4-point Kashmir formula negotiated
quote: Terrorism is a global challenge that requires a global response, including from Pakistan.

name: Farooq Abdullah
role: Three-time J&K CM; National Conference leader; supports special status for J&K within India
quote: We are Indians first. But we want our special status that Article 370 gave us restored.

name: Omar Abdullah
role: J&K CM (current); National Conference leader; won 2024 J&K Assembly elections after Article 370 revocation
quote: The people of J&K have voted for development and their rights. We expect statehood to be restored.

name: General Asim Munir
role: Pakistan COAS since Nov 2022; former ISI chief; presided over Operation Sindoor response (May 2025)
quote: Kashmir runs in our blood and we will not waver in our principled stand.

name: António Guterres
role: UN Secretary-General; called for de-escalation after Balakot (2019) and Operation Sindoor (2025)
quote: I call on both India and Pakistan to exercise maximum restraint and to resume dialogue immediately.

name: Shehbaz Sharif
role: Pakistan PM 2022–2024; PM during Operation Sindoor crisis May 2025; managed Pakistan's response
quote: Pakistan is a peace-loving nation. We will respond to Indian aggression with full force if provoked.

name: Rajnath Singh
role: Indian Defence Minister since 2019; authorized Balakot follow-up plans; oversaw Operation Sindoor
quote: India's armed forces have the capability and the will to protect every inch of our territory.

name: Dr. A.Q. Khan
role: Father of Pakistan's nuclear bomb; ran global nuclear proliferation network sold to Iran, Libya, North Korea
quote: I saved my country from a certain catastrophe. Pakistan needed the bomb, and I gave it to them.

name: Wing Commander Abhinandan Varthaman
role: IAF pilot; shot down over Pakistan in Feb 2019 dogfight; captured and released; became national hero
quote: The Pakistani Army has been very good to me. I am sorry, I'm not supposed to say that.
